steps.title: Translate costs into mathematical expressions
steps.content: The bread costs a fixed 3 dollars. Grapes cost 2.20 dollars per pound, so p pounds cost $2.20p$. The total paid is 14.00 dollars.

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost is the sum of the bread and grapes:
$$3 + 2.20p = 14.00$$
Rearranging: $2.20p + 3 = 14.00$. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
